hmong.bottom_line_value_per_interval: Tus nqi ntawm kab hauv qab rau ib qho interval
hmong.unit_relationship: Kev sib raug zoo ntawm unit:

hmong.per_interval_for: rau ib qho interval, tag nrho
hmong.enter_an_amount_greater_than_zero_for_: Sau ib tus nqi loj tshaj xoom rau ob qho kev xaiv.
hmong.both_options_have_the_same_cost_per_un: Ob qho kev xaiv muaj tib yam cost per unit.
hmong.option_a_has_the_lower_cost_per_unit: Option A muaj cost per unit qis dua.
hmong.option_b_has_the_lower_cost_per_unit: Option B muaj cost per unit qis dua.
hmong.adjust_the_values_so_both_unit_rates_s: Kho cov nqi kom ob tug unit rate nyob hauv learning-model range.
hmong.rate_outside_model_range: Tus rate nyob sab nraum model range
hmong.a_fair_comparison_divides_each_cost_by: Ib qho kev sib piv ncaj ncees muab txhua tus cost faib rau nws tus kheej quantity. Lub ntsiab kuj tseem yuav muaj xws li tus zoo, khoom pov tseg, los sis lwm yam xav tau.
hmong.this_example_is_above_the_1000_learnin: Qhov piv txwv no siab tshaj 1000% ntawm learning model. Kho lub feem los sis tag nrho.
hmong.this_result_is_above_the_1_000_000_qua: Qhov tshwm sim no siab tshaj 1,000,000 quantity limit. Kho cov nqi ntawm qhov piv txwv.
hmong.the_percent_is_not_defined_when_the_wh: Percent tsis muaj txhais thaum tag nrho yog xoom. Sau ib tug tag nrho positive los tsim daim tape.
hmong.the_whole_is_not_defined_when_the_perc: Tag nrho tsis muaj txhais thaum percent yog xoom. Sau ib tug percent positive los tsim daim tape.
hmong.ten_equal_sections_each_represent_10_o: Kaum section sib npaug, txhua qho sawv cev rau 10% ntawm ib tag nrho.
hmong.each_outlined_section_is_exactly_10_of: Txhua section uas muaj kab ncig yog raws nraim 10% ntawm ib tag nrho. Ib section uas puv ib nrab qhia qhov fraction raws nraim ntawm 10% ntawd.
hmong.enter_at_least_two_valid_coordinate_pa: Sau tsawg kawg ob khub coordinate valid, nrog rau ib khub uas muaj x-value tsis yog xoom.
hmong.proportional_the_unit_rate_is_constant: Proportional: tus unit rate ruaj khov.
hmong.not_proportional_the_evidence_does_not: Tsis proportional: cov pov thawj tsis qhia ib tus unit rate ruaj khov hla lub origin.
hmong.use_the_same_number_of_x_and_y_values_: Siv tib tus naj npawb ntawm x- thiab y-value. Daim first-quadrant graph no xav tau ib tug naj npawb non-negative rau txhua kab.
hmong.fix_the_coordinate_list_before_making_: Kho daim coordinate list ua ntej txiav txim txog proportionality:
hmong.table_and_unit_rate_evidence: Pov thawj ntawm table thiab unit rate
hmong.no_valid_paired_rows_yet: Tseem tsis tau muaj paired rows valid.
hmong.a_proportional_model_ray_is_extended_t: Ib tug proportional model ray raug txuas ntxiv hla lub origin.
hmong.no_complete_set_of_points_is_available: Tsis muaj ib pawg points puv los graph.
hmong.table_evidence_all_defined_y_x_values_: Table pov thawj: txhua tus y ÷ x value uas muaj txhais sib npaug rau
hmong.the_entered_points_include_0_0_and_fol: cov points uas sau muaj (0,0) thiab raws li model ray.
hmong.the_model_ray_extends_the_constant_rel: model ray txuas qhov constant relationship hla (0,0), txawm tias tsis tau sau lub origin.
hmong.check_for_changing_y_x_values_a_nonzer: Xyuas seb puas muaj y ÷ x value hloov, ib tug y-value tsis yog xoom thaum x = 0, los sis cov points uas tsis nyob rau ib txoj kab ncaj hla lub origin.
hmong.enter_an_answer_before_checking: Sau ib qho lus teb ua ntej xyuas.
hmong.move_between_representations_and_expla: Txav mus los ntawm cov representation thiab piav qhov multiplicative relationship.
hmong.ratio_lab_learning_modes: Cov learning mode ntawm Ratio Lab
hmong.best_for_fair_comparisons_because_ever: Zoo tshaj rau kev sib piv ncaj ncees vim txhua qhov xwm txheej raug sau dua rau ib unit.
hmong.a_ratio_measured_against_a_whole_of_10: Ib tug ratio ntsuas rau ib tag nrho ntawm 100; siv feem = percent × tag nrho.
hmong.a_straight_line_through_the_origin_sho: Ib txoj kab ncaj hla lub origin qhia ib tug multiplier ruaj khov txij x mus rau y.
hmong.estimate_first_preserve_units_and_ask_: Kwv yees ua ntej, khaws cov unit, thiab nug seb ob tug quantity puas hloov ua multiplicative.
